Who We Are

Crafting Beautiful Landscapes in the Triangle

Organic Landscaping was founded right here in Raleigh over a decade ago with a simple mission: to bring sustainable and beautiful landscapes to our community. We saw a need for landscaping that not only looked great but also respected the environment and thrived in our Piedmont climate.

Our approach is rooted in understanding the unique challenges of Raleigh's red clay soil and humid summers. We prioritize native plants, efficient irrigation, and soil health to create landscapes that are both stunning and resilient. We believe in open communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations on every project.

We're proud to be a part of the Raleigh community. We actively support local organizations and strive to minimize our environmental impact through responsible waste management and eco-friendly practices. We are committed to leaving a positive legacy, one landscape at a time.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose organic landscaping - raleigh, nc

Sustainable Practices

Eco-friendly landscaping that minimizes environmental impact and promotes biodiversity.

Local Expertise

Deep understanding of Raleigh's climate, soil, and native plant species.

Custom Designs

Tailored landscaping solutions that reflect your personal style and enhance your property's value.

Reliable Service

Dedicated team committed to providing exceptional service from initial consultation to project completion.

Ready to Transform Your Landscape?

Contact us today for a free consultation and discover the possibilities for your outdoor space.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Organic Landscaping completely transformed our backyard! We have an older ranch home ITB, and the team created a beautiful, functional space that we now use constantly. They were professional, responsive, and truly listened to our ideas. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Landscape Design
“

We've been using Organic Landscaping for lawn care for the past year, and our lawn has never looked better. They are reliable and efficient, and they always leave our yard looking immaculate. The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is that communication can sometimes be a bit slow. But overall, very happy with their service.

David K. Lawn Care & Maintenance
“

Organic Landscaping built a beautiful paver patio for us. The team helped us select the perfect materials to complement our home, and the installation was flawless. They were professional, courteous, and completed the project on time and within budget. We love our new patio!

Emily R. Hardscaping
“

Organic Landscaping installed a new irrigation system for our lawn and garden, and it has made a huge difference. Our plants are healthier and our water bill is lower. The team was knowledgeable and efficient, and they explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

Michael L. Irrigation Systems
“

We hired Organic Landscaping to install outdoor lighting around our home, and we are very pleased with the results. The lighting has enhanced the beauty of our landscape and increased our sense of security. The team was professional and courteous, and they completed the project quickly and efficiently. I would recommend them.

Jessica P. Outdoor Lighting
“

After years of dealing with standing water in our backyard, we finally decided to call Organic Landscaping. They installed a French drain that completely solved the problem. Our backyard is now dry and usable, and we couldn't be happier. The team was professional, knowledgeable, and efficient. Highly recommend!

Brian S. Drainage Solutions

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the typical timeline for a landscape design project?
The timeline varies depending on the size and complexity of the project, but typically ranges from 2-6 weeks from initial consultation to final design presentation.
Do you offer design services for commercial properties?
Yes, we provide landscape design services for both residential and commercial properties in the Raleigh area.
How do you ensure the design is sustainable and environmentally friendly?
We prioritize native plants, efficient irrigation systems, and sustainable materials to minimize environmental impact and promote biodiversity.
